Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1410

Title: Provides liability protections for health care providers who issue vaccines
Summary: Provides liability protections for health care providers who issue vaccines so long as such vaccination does not arise out of willful misconduct or gross negligence.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to liability protections for persons administering vaccinations
